notes: Los MCP locales o sin token pueden quedar documentados y listos para configurar.
Los MCP con credenciales no deben activarse ni recibir tokens sin aprobacion explicita.
Ningun token, archivo .env o secreto debe guardarse en el repo.

servers.name: Playwright MCP
servers.purpose: Browser automation, structured accessibility snapshots and UI verification.

servers.name: Chrome DevTools MCP
servers.purpose: Debugging, performance inspection and browser diagnostics.

servers.name: Filesystem MCP
servers.purpose: Controlled local filesystem context for repo-aware agents.

servers.name: Memory MCP
servers.purpose: Knowledge graph memory for stable project facts and decisions.

servers.name: GitHub MCP Server
servers.purpose: Repository, issue, pull request and workflow operations.

servers.name: Vercel MCP
servers.purpose: Vercel documentation, project inspection and deployment operations.

servers.name: Figma MCP
servers.purpose: Design system inspection, editable design handoff and UI review.

servers.name: Fetch MCP
servers.purpose: Controlled web retrieval for documentation and source checks.

servers.name: Sequential Thinking MCP
servers.purpose: Structured decomposition for complex architecture or methodology changes.
